Grid.TextBlock:
SECRET
1. (S) National technical means have located a USSR DON class sub tender in the Spratly Islands at Jackson Atoll. This tender is resupplying a force of KILO, ROMEO, and TANGO class SSKs in the area operating in support of enemy invasion of Palawan Island.
2. (S) Break off from inshore reconnaissance at Cam Ranh and proceed at best speed to Jackson Atoll.
3. (S) Tender is protected by a small escort force including Chinese subchasers. 1 x UDALOY class FFG was spotted on last satellite pass, but may have moved out of the area. Note: shallow hydrography in this area is hazardous, and Philippine Navy passes warning that minelaying operations are in progress. Minefield locations will be passed to you ASAP.
4. (S) Take sub tender and all enemy SSKs encountered with torpedo or missile. If UDALOY class FFG is encountered, prioritize destruction of this unit in addition to DON class tender.
5. (S) Report location of sinking if tactical situation permits, then disengage via Palawan Passage to Darwin, Australia. Good luck and good hunting. COMSUBPAC sends.
SECRET
DECL OADR BT
